title: Resolve merge conflicts in simulation.py
description: Clean up the two merge conflict sections in _deliver_pending_packets and _get_rx_result_internal. Unify RX metrics/logging between polling and push paths to avoid duplication (dead code). Ensure CCP-9 rendezvous (rx_frequency_hz=None, channel calc) and TDMA compatibility. Use independent oracles.
close_reason: Resolved merge conflicts and unified RX paths in simulation.py. Added proper channel=node.current_channel to get_rx_candidates for TDMA/CCP-9 rendezvous compatibility. Removed comment. Tests and ruff pass. Commit 7b6cfac40
